installBanner.title: Add to your home screen for quick access
installBanner.description: Get faster access to your recipes

installInstructions.title: Add to Home Screen
installInstructions.description: Follow these steps to add Meal Maestro to your home screen:

step1.title: Tap the Share button
step1.description: Located at the bottom of your browser

step2.title: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
step2.description: You may need to scroll to find this option

step3.title: Tap "Add" to confirm
step3.description: Meal Maestro will appear on your home screen

migration.title: Database Migration Complete
migration.description: We've migrated to a new database infrastructure. Magic link login and recipe sharing are temporarily unavailable while we finalize the transition.

home.title: Meal Maestro
home.subtitle: AI-Powered Recipe Management
home.description: Organize, discover, and manage your recipes with natural language conversations
home.signInDescription: Sign in to start organizing your recipes with AI-powered management
home.signedInMessage: You're successfully signed in and ready to start managing your recipes!
home.termsText: By signing in, you agree to our use of essential cookies for authentication, terms of service and privacy policy. Your recipes will be securely stored and only accessible to you.

auth.magicLinkSent: We've sent a magic link to your email. Click the link to sign in.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.authTimeout: Authentication timed out. Please try again.
auth.authError: An authentication error occurred. Please try again.
auth.invalidLink: The magic link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred during authentication.
auth.emailSentDescription: Check your email and click the link to sign in or create your account. The link will expire in 1 hour.
auth.magicLinkInfo: We'll send you a secure link to sign in or create an account without a password. Links expire after 1 hour.
auth.pleaseWaitBeforeRetrying: Please wait before requesting another magic link
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.signInError: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.signUpError: Failed to create account. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for that email address, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.resetError: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

recipes.title: Your Recipes
recipes.description: Manage and search through your recipe collection
recipes.noRecipesDescription: Start building your recipe collection! Add your first recipe to get started.
recipes.createNewRecipe: Create a new recipe for your collection
recipes.selectDateDescription: Choose the date when you ate this recipe
recipes.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this recipe?

shareDialog.title: Share this recipe
shareDialog.description: Generate a link so friends can view this recipe.
shareDialog.allowSaveNote: Anyone with the link can view this recipe and save it to their account.
shareDialog.readOnlyNote: Anyone with the link can view this recipe, but saving is disabled.
shareDialog.noLinkNote: Generate a new link if you need to copy it again.

recipes.viewSharedBannerAnonymous: This recipe was shared via a link by {name}.
recipes.viewSharedAllowSaveDisabled: Saving this recipe has been disabled by the owner.
recipes.viewSharedInvalid: This share link is invalid or may have been revoked.
recipes.viewSharedMissingToken: This share link is missing a required token.
recipes.viewSharedError: We couldn't load this shared recipe.

recipeForm.referenceHelper: Add a link or free text like “Ottolenghi, page 42”.
recipeForm.utensilsPlaceholder: e.g., Baking tray, mixing bowl, kitchen scale
recipeForm.utensilsHelper: List utensils separated by commas or new lines. Shown in recipe details and shared views.
recipeForm.notesPlaceholder: Who enjoyed this, utensil notes, variations…
recipeForm.title: Title
recipeForm.invalidAmount: Amount must be a positive number or empty for 'to taste'
recipeForm.useSectionsDescription: Split ingredients and instructions into separate sections for multi-part recipes. Leave off for simple dishes.
recipeForm.sectionInstructionsPlaceholder: Describe the steps for this section…
recipeForm.descriptionPlaceholder:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add rice and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until heated through.
3. Push rice to one side and scramble eggs on the other side.
4. Mix eggs with rice and add vegetables.
5. Season with soy sauce and serve hot.

validationErrors.title: Please check these details
validationErrors.titleMissing: Your recipe needs a name so you can find it later
validationErrors.descriptionMissing: Adding a description helps you remember what makes this recipe special
validationErrors.ingredientNameMissing: Some ingredients are missing their names - what should we add?
validationErrors.ingredientIssue: Let's make sure all your ingredients are properly filled in

nutrition.title: Nutrition
nutrition.description: Fetch an AI-estimated nutrition summary for this recipe. Values are informational only.

needsIngredients.title: Add ingredients first
needsIngredients.body: We need at least one ingredient with a name before estimating nutrition.

nutrition.stale: Ingredients or servings changed since the last estimate. Refresh to keep numbers accurate.

cacheHit.title: Using cached nutrition
cacheHit.body: These numbers came from a recent fetch with identical ingredients. Refresh if something changed.

nutrition.errorFallback: Unable to calculate nutrition right now. Please try again later.
nutrition.emptyState: No nutrition data yet. Fetch values once you are ready.
nutrition.disclaimer: Nutrition values are estimates generated by AI. Consult a qualified professional for medical or dietary advice.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.overview: Overview of system usage and costs for current month
admin.highestSpendingUsers: Users with highest spending this month
admin.unusuallyHighUsage: Users with unusually high usage (2x+ average)
admin.modelUsageDescription: Usage statistics by AI model type
admin.noModelUsageData: No model usage data available for the selected period
admin.noCostData: No cost data available for the selected period
admin.noUserData: No user data available for the selected period

recipeTable.title: Recipe Title
recipeTable.selectBulkDateDescription: Choose the date when you ate these {count} recipes
recipeTable.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {count} recipe{plural}? This action cannot be undone.

datePicker.selectDateDescription: Choose the date when you ate this recipe

toast.deleteRecipeError: Failed to delete recipes. Please try again.
toast.markEatenError: Failed to mark recipes as eaten. Please try again.
toast.saveRecipeError: Failed to save recipe. Please try again.
toast.updateRecipeError: Failed to update recipe. Please try again.

unitSelect.addCustomUnitDescription: Create a custom unit for your ingredients. For example: "handful", "pot", "medium bowl".
unitSelect.confirmDeleteUnit: Are you sure you want to delete the unit "{unit}"? This action cannot be undone.

philosophy.title: My Philosophy
philosophy.description: Meal Maestro shows how software should really work: no subscriptions, no ads, no tracking cookies. Just a handy tool that does what it's supposed to do — nothing more, nothing less.

story.title: Why This App?
story.description: Built by a developer who always wanted a recipe management app but found entering recipes manually tedious and time-consuming. The solution? Harness AI to make adding recipes effortless while providing intelligent recommendations and assistance with recipe management.

sustainability.title: Support Meal Maestro
sustainability.description: Meal Maestro is free to use, without ads and without subscriptions. Does the app save you a lot of time? Then I would greatly appreciate it if you would make a contribution. Together we keep Meal Maestro running, free from ads and subscriptions. It costs money to use the AI and to host the website online. With your support I can ensure that Meal Maestro remains available and independent.
sustainability.qrInstructions: Scan with your banking app (not camera)

community.title: Share Meal Maestro
community.description: Find Meal Maestro helpful? Share the app with fellow cooking enthusiasts and help make the platform better with your feedback.

costs.title: Transparency in Costs
costs.description: I would like to share what it costs to run Meal Maestro. Here's a breakdown of the infrastructure costs and the costs generated by your usage.

usage.title: Your Usage Costs
usage.yourCosts: These costs are related to generating and storing your recipes.
usage.signInToSee: Sign in to see your personal usage costs:

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.description: Help us improve Meal Maestro by sharing your thoughts and suggestions.

success.submitted: Thank you! Your feedback has been submitted successfully.

errors.rateLimited: You've submitted too much feedback recently. Please try again later.
errors.submitFailed: Failed to submit feedback. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.signInRequired: Please sign in to send feedback

validation.required: Please fill in all required fields
validation.subjectTooLong: Subject must be less than 200 characters
validation.messageTooLong: Message must be less than 2000 characters

footer.description: AI-powered recipe management that respects your privacy and keeps your culinary creativity organized.
footer.copyright: Made with care for home cooks everywhere.

info.title: Account Information
info.description: Your account details and sign-in information

preciseMetric.title: Precise Metric
preciseMetric.description: Only weight (g, kg) and volume (ml, l). Converts spoons to ml for maximum precision.

traditionalMetric.title: Traditional Metric
traditionalMetric.description: Metric system with measuring spoons (g, kg, ml, l, tsp, tbsp). Good balance of precision and practicality.

usTraditional.title: US Traditional
usTraditional.description: US measurements (cups, oz, lb, tbsp, tsp, fl oz). Traditional American recipe format.

mixed.title: Mixed (No Conversion)
mixed.description: Keep original units from recipes. No automatic conversions.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

deleted.recipes: All your recipes and recipe data

preserved.costData: Anonymous usage and cost data (for business accounting)

partner.title: Partner Sharing
partner.description: Share your recipes with a household partner

invite.title: Invite a Partner
invite.description: Enter the email address of your Meal Maestro partner. They will receive an invitation to share recipes with you.
invite.successDescription: An invitation has been sent to {email}.
invite.errorNoUser: No Meal Maestro account found with that email address.
invite.errorDuplicate: A pending invitation already exists for this email.
invite.errorAlreadyPartnered: You are already partnered with this user.
invite.errorMaxPartnerships: You already have an active partnership.

unlink.title: Unlink Partner
unlink.description: Are you sure you want to unlink your partner? You will no longer share recipes.
unlink.copyRecipesLabel: Copy my partner's recipes to my account
unlink.copyRecipesDescription: If checked, all of your partner's recipes will be copied to your account before unlinking.
unlink.successDescription: You have been successfully unlinked from your partner.

deleteAccountModal.title: Delete Account
deleteAccountModal.warning: This action will permanently delete your account and cannot be undone.
deleteAccountModal.confirmationLabel: Type your email address to confirm:
deleteAccountModal.confirmationMismatch: Please type your email address exactly to confirm deletion
deleteAccountModal.success: Account successfully deleted. You will be signed out.
deleteAccountModal.error: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
